summary: Excellent matrix recording of a great run
review: The reviewer, who attended the concert, gives the show a perfect five‑star rating and highlights a “great run” along with a “nice matrix” source, indicating both strong performance and high‑quality recording. No specific song or band member details are mentioned, but the overall sentiment is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review; it praises both performance and matrix recording, suggesting a top‑tier experience, but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer specifically calls the matrix source "nice" and reports no problems, implying clear and well‑balanced sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a "great run," indicating a solid overall flow and energy throughout the set.
